summary: Label Print Modal improvements verified - QR code, Barcode for serial number, and Asset ID nowrap styling all working correctly
critical_code_review_comments: react-barcode library properly imported in both components (line 17 GoodsReceiptWorkflow.jsx, line 25 AssetManagementV2.jsx)
printLabel function includes white-space: nowrap CSS for asset ID (line 463 and 601)
Label preview uses whitespace-nowrap class for Asset ID display (line 2246 and 2913)
Barcode component renders conditionally when manufacturer_sn exists (line 2255 and 2922)
data-qr-preview and data-barcode-preview attributes properly set for print function to extract SVGs
seed_data_creation: Created bulk asset TSRID-TAB-i7-0002 with serial number PENDING-0001 for testing

Navigate: Portal Login -> Assets -> Rollout Management -> Wareneingang -> Nicht zugewiesen -> Click printer icon on asset row
